title: Quiz 2
description: This quiz covers ownership, structs, enums, modules, collections, and error handling (Chapters 7-12).
instructions: Complete the program that models a command system using enums and structs.
hints: Add `pub` before `fn transformer` to make it public.
For Trim: string.trim().to_string(), For Append(n): repeat "bar" n times
explanation: This quiz combines enums with data, pattern matching, modules with visibility, string manipulation, and vectors. The Command enum uses variants with different data types, and pattern matching handles each case. The module system requires `pub` for external access, and `use super::Command` imports from the parent module.
